easy.title: What is OVii Chat?
easy.intro: Hey there! OVii Chat is a super cool, secret chat room hidden right inside the Novario News website. Imagine reading the news and then finding a secret door that takes you to a private room where you can hang out, send disappearing messages, and share photos or voice notes with another person!

sections.heading: How to Get In
sections.content: To get into this secret chat room, you just go to the News tab and pick a specific language option. It's like a secret handshake that opens the door to OVii Chat!

sections.heading: What You Can Do
sections.content: Once you're inside, you can pick a cool avatar and a nickname. You can send text messages, record voice notes, and share pictures or videos. The best part? The room is just for two people at a time, making it super private.

sections.heading: Disappearing Magic
sections.content: We care about privacy! Every message you send will magically disappear after a few days. It's like writing on the sand at the beach – eventually, the waves wash it away, leaving no trace behind.

sections.heading: Cool Features
sections.content: You can see when the other person is typing or recording a voice note in real-time. If you want to reply to a specific message, just swipe on it! Plus, there's a dark mode and 6 custom 'Paints' dual-tone themes to personalize your chat bubbles however you like.

easy.summary: In short: OVii Chat is a fun, private, hidden messaging app inside Novario News where you can chat, share media, and know that everything will safely disappear after a while.

medium.title: OVii Chat: Overview and Purpose
medium.intro: OVii Chat is a private, lightweight messaging platform seamlessly integrated as a hidden feature within the Novario News application. It was designed to provide a secure, ephemeral communication space without the heavy tracking or permanent storage typical of mainstream social apps.

sections.heading: Access and Entry
sections.content: Accessing OVii Chat is designed to be discreet. Users navigating the Novario News platform can enter the chat environment by selecting a specific language option under the News tab. This acts as a gateway to the private communication portal.

sections.heading: Core Functionality
sections.content: The application supports one-on-one real-time messaging. Users can customize their identity per session using built-in avatars. It fully supports sending text, uploading photos and videos, and recording high-quality voice notes.

sections.heading: Privacy and Retention
sections.content: Privacy is the core pillar of OVii Chat. We implemented a strict 14-day data retention policy. All messages, photos, and voice notes are automatically permanently deleted from the system after this period, ensuring that conversations remain truly ephemeral.

sections.heading: User Experience Highlights
sections.content: The interface is optimized for a premium, app-like feel on both mobile and desktop. It features a custom 'Build Book' to view development history, real-time typing indicators, a 'No Lock' feature to keep the session active, a sleek Dark Mode, and a new 'Paints' menu for selecting distinct dual-tone UI themes.

medium.summary: Summary: OVii Chat provides a hidden, secure, and user-friendly messaging experience with a strict auto-deletion policy, designed for seamless and private one-on-one communication.

hard.title: OVii Chat: Technical Architecture & File Tree
hard.intro: OVii Chat is an advanced, React-based ephemeral messaging progressive web app (PWA) embedded within the Novario ecosystem. It leverages a serverless architecture utilizing Firebase for real-time synchronization and Cloudinary for optimized media asset delivery.

sections.heading: Gateway Routing Integration
sections.content: The application operates as a hidden route within Novario News. The entry sequence is obfuscated; users trigger the OVii Chat initialization by selecting a specific localized language parameter (e.g., 'ovii') within the News tab UI. The router (src/routes/__root.tsx, src/routes/ovii.tsx) detects this parameter and mounts the OVii component, bypassing standard navigation paths like index.tsx, news.tsx, or newsroom.tsx.

sections.heading: Real-Time Infrastructure
sections.content: State synchronization is handled via Firebase Firestore (src/lib/firebase.ts). We utilize snapshot listeners (onSnapshot) to push updates instantly to clients. The architecture includes a `messages` collection for the chat payload and a highly optimized `presence` collection that tracks user status (online/offline), typing states, and active audio recording states. Heartbeat mechanisms run every 15 seconds to manage session lifecycles, and anonymous authentication (signInAnonymously) secures the connection.

sections.heading: Core UI Component
sections.content: The heart of the application is src/components/novario/OViiChat.tsx. It manages all sub-states: real-time messaging, file uploading, media previews, audio playback (wavesurfer.js), presence tracking, dynamic custom 'Paints' theming via local storage, and the custom Build Book (changelog viewer). It employs Framer Motion for high-fidelity animations, a ResizeObserver for robust mobile-first auto-scrolling, and visual viewport metrics to compensate for software keyboards on iOS/Android.

sections.heading: Media Pipeline and Storage
sections.content: Media handling is entirely decoupled from Firebase to optimize costs and bandwidth. Image, video, and audio file uploads are piped directly to Cloudinary's REST API using unsigned upload presets. Voice notes are captured via the native MediaRecorder API (encoded as WebM/Opus) and visualized in the UI using the wavesurfer.js library, complete with playback speed controls (1x, 1.5x, 2x).

sections.heading: Retention Engine and Data Lifecycle
sections.content: OVii enforces a strict programmatic 14-day TTL (Time To Live) retention policy. Client-side hydration scripts evaluate message timestamps (createdAt) against the current epoch. If now - timestamp > 14 days, the client initiates a secure deleteDoc transaction to purge the record from Firestore permanently. Text messages are purged at 5 days, while media assets persist for the full 14-day cycle in 'My Files'.

sections.heading: Complete System File Tree
sections.content:
Below is the complete file and component architecture of the Novario/OVii system:

src/
├── main.tsx (Entry Point)
├── router.tsx
├── styles.css
├── components/
│   ├── novario/
│   │   ├── ArticleTimeline.tsx
│   │   ├── BottomNav.tsx
│   │   ├── BreakingTicker.tsx
│   │   ├── CategoryGrid.tsx
│   │   ├── Header.tsx
│   │   ├── HeroSlider.tsx
│   │   ├── LanguageMenu.tsx
│   │   ├── LiveCounter.tsx
│   │   ├── LiveIllustration.tsx
│   │   ├── OViiChat.tsx (Core Engine)
│   │   ├── PasswordModal.tsx
│   │   ├── ShareCard.tsx
│   │   ├── TrendingPeople.tsx
│   │   ├── TrendingRow.tsx
│   │   └── WeatherWidget.tsx
│   └── ui/ (Shadcn UI Library)
│       ├── accordion.tsx, alert.tsx, avatar.tsx, badge.tsx, button.tsx, card.tsx, carousel.tsx
│       ├── dialog.tsx, drawer.tsx, dropdown-menu.tsx, input.tsx, popover.tsx, scroll-area.tsx
│       ├── select.tsx, sheet.tsx, sidebar.tsx, sonner.tsx, switch.tsx, tabs.tsx, tooltip.tsx, etc.
├── hooks/
│   └── use-mobile.tsx
├── lib/
│   ├── avatars.ts
│   ├── changelog.json
│   ├── cities.ts
│   ├── crypto.ts
│   ├── firebase.ts (Database config)
│   ├── history.json
│   ├── i18n.tsx
│   ├── languages.ts
│   ├── location.ts
│   ├── news.ts
│   └── utils.ts
├── routes/
│   ├── __root.tsx
│   ├── about.tsx, contact.tsx, index.tsx, privacy.tsx, terms.tsx
│   ├── news.tsx, news.$slug.tsx, newsroom.tsx
│   └── ovii.tsx (Chat entry point)
└── server/
    └── newsapi.functions.ts

hard.summary: Technical Summary: OVii Chat is a high-performance, serverless React application utilizing Firebase Firestore for sub-second presence/message synchronization, Cloudinary for robust media pipelines, and Framer Motion for native-tier UX, all secured by a strict 14-day cryptographic data purge protocol.
